examples: Cloud computing is definitely not vaporware.
Misunderstanding: SAML is vaporware; no one has implemented it yet.
At times like this, there's only one thing Microsoft can do: launch a preemptive vaporware response.
Originally slated for release in 1998, Duke Nukem Forever became the most infamous example of vaporware in history.
Yet for many companies in the industry, it is just vaporware and hype.
